zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Spillman於大約1538年出生在瑞士格格時，她的父親Hans Michael Spilmann44歲，母親Margaretha Hess42歲。她和Michael Speck至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Spillman于大约1538年出生在瑞士格格时，她的父亲Hans Michael Spilmann44岁，母亲Margaretha Hess42岁。她和Michael Speck至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Spillman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German Spillmann: variant of Spielmann .

variants.name: Spellman
meanings: English: from the early Middle English personal name Spileman, Speleman, late Old English Spilemann. Its original sense was probably ‘entertainer’ (literally ‘play-man’), corresponding to Middle High German spilmann, Middle Low German speelman (see above). However, although spile ‘play, sport, revelry’ and spilen ‘to play’ occur in Middle English, there is no evidence for a word spileman, and all the English evidence points to this surname being from the personal name rather than an occupational name.
Irish: in Connacht, an Anglicized form of Mac Spealáin and Ó Spealáin (see Spillane ).
Americanized form of German Spellmann: occupational name for a musician or minstrel, from Middle Low German spel ‘play’ + man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.description: All European peace treaty formally accepts Switzerland as an independent nation.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Spillman was born about 1538, in Zug, Zug, Switzerland, her father, Hans Michael Spilmann, was 44 and her mother, Margaretha Hess, was 42. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Michael Speck.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Spillman est née environ 1538, à Zug, Zoug, Suisse, son père, Hans Michael Spilmann, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaretha Hess, avait 42 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Michael Speck.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Spillman um 1538 in Zug, Zug, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hans Michael Spilmann 44 und ihre Mutter Margaretha Hess 42. Sie hatte mit Michael Speck mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Spillman è nata il circa 1538 nel Zug, Zugo, Svizzera, sua padre, Hans Michael Spilmann, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Margaretha Hess, aveva 42 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Michael Speck.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Spillmanが約1538年にスイスズグズグで生まれた時，父Hans Michael Spilmannは44歳，母Margaretha Hessは42歳であった。彼女はMichael Speckとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Spillman(이)가 대략 1538년 스위스 주그 주그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hans Michael Spilmann(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaretha Hess(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 Michael Speck(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Spillman nasceu aproximadamente 1538, em Zug, Zug, Suiça, seu pai, Hans Michael Spilmann, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaretha Hess, tinha 42 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Michael Speck.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Spillman родилась около 1538 г. в местности зуг, зуг, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Hans Michael Spilmann было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaretha Hess, 42. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Michael Speck.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Spillman nació aproximadamente 1538, en Zug, Zug, Suiza, su papá, Hans Michael Spilmann, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Margaretha Hess, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Michael Speck.
